content.raw:
{"nodeType":"document","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"For a month you have lain between us
And I have been a boy against your back
Searchlights slicing our blackout
Above the factory where dad made munitions
And now and then you would turn and hug
So I heard your heart detonating and you
Saying that we were polar bears and I
Was your cub under the snowy sheets...","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"I make tea against your absence
Night's ebb resolving as tree sway
A bird quick as fish across the shallow lawn
No trace of you in all this endless brevity.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"
","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}
